title: PR-1 GameSession core runtime and initializer scaffold
summary: Implement the minimal sim-core authoritative GameSessionRuntime scaffold, store ownership composition, scenario initializer path and headless parity surface for the PR-1 integrated session without public protocol/schema/save mutation.
acceptance: A package-root-exported sim-core GameSessionRuntime or equivalent focused PR-1 runtime surface owns tick, seed, random streams, command ordering, owner-store composition, metrics and canonical hash input without DOM/React/Pixi/Electron/Node filesystem or real-clock dependencies

The runtime composes PR-1 minimum owner stores for map/entity/location/spatial, residents, resources, jobs, reservations, WorkOffers, path basis, day/night, lamp/build and structured reasons; derived indexes name owner-version basis and rebuild paths

A ScenarioDefinition initializer creates at least the roadmap minimum: 64x64 navigable map, 8 residents, food/wood/stone/lamp oil or material lanes, inventory/storage, beds or rest fixtures, lamp target and one buildable structure
Historical M1-M8 scenario runners are not called as the product runtime; any reused facts are copied through initializer code or explicitly marked regression/test-only

Tick advancement is fixed 30 TPS integer semantics with stable phase ordering, no Math.random/Date/performance access, no global scans, no hidden singletons, no coroutine/Promise job position and no unversioned caches
Headless tests can create the same GameSessionRuntime, step explicit ticks, queue deterministic commands and produce stable world/read-model hashes

The headless CLI registers only the exact pr1-integrated-gamesession alias in tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts and delegates it to a package-root-exported @wuming-town/sim-core scenario entry; the tool does not copy or own GameSession runtime, tick, store, command, projection or hash logic, and its focused test covers accepted dispatch plus continued rejection of unknown scenarios
The runtime exposes read-only projection builders for RenderSnapshot/UiDelta basis data but does not import protocol, Web, React, Pixi or Electron presentation code
A 100000 tick sim-core leak/conservation test covers jobs, reservations, queues and PR-1 resources, with structured diagnostics for first divergence
Existing M1-M8 regression facts are either unchanged or any fixture/hash update is explicitly justified in the task report; no public save container, schema or compatibility promise is introduced
The report lists every reused store, adapted scenario fact and still-unconnected historical capability
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run packages/sim-core/src/game-session.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/runner.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/entity-store.invariants.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/job-core.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/work-offers.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/pathing.test.ts tools/headless-runner/src/index.test.ts

history.details: Scoped as the first PR-1 critical-path sim-core task from WM-0162 architecture; remains proposed until WM-0162 is verified and done.
Kept WM-0163 protocol-neutral and changed its sole downstream edge to WM-0164; protocol and Web consumers now follow serially. Task remains proposed and unclaimed.

Allowed-path/required-check conflict: corepack pnpm sim:run -- --scenario pr1-integrated-gamesession is rejected in tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts before sim-core runner code runs, but WM-0163 allowedPaths exclude tools/headless-runner/**. Please add the focused CLI registry/test paths (or define an in-scope dynamic registration contract); sim-core must not use process.argv/Node-global workarounds.

Resolved allowed-path/required-check conflict in commit 231956f: exact tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts and index.test.ts are now documented/allowed, focused checks include the CLI test, and the adapter must call only the @wuming-town/sim-core public scenario entry with no runtime copy, tools wildcard, cli.ts change, or process.argv workaround.

Implemented package-root PR-1 GameSessionRuntime/initializer, deterministic owner graph/phase/queue/hash/projections, exact headless alias, and 100000-tick conservation coverage; all required gates pass.

changes_requested: High: the 100000-tick gate is a false green for jobs/reservations. game-session-tick phases 4/5 create or advance no job/reservation, diagnostics labels any legitimate active job/reservation as a leak immediately, and both CLI runs report jobTerminalCount=0/activeReservationCount=0. High: canonical world/read-model hashes omit authoritative lanes; distinct comfort-vs-social mutations with equal owner versions produced identical world and read hashes, so Worker/headless parity can miss divergence. Medium: the hot tick path calls allocating NeedStore/NeedUrgency metrics/result APIs every tick and per changed lane. Require a real bounded existing-store job/reservation lifecycle with non-zero peak/terminal evidence and correct total conservation, canonical hashing of all PR-1 authoritative/read-model facts with collision tests, and no-allocation hot-path integration. Focused/CLI/quality/coordination gates pass but do not close these semantic findings.

Addressed MSG-MREUXRSP-CD16AE: added real bounded JobCore/Reservation phase lifecycle with non-zero peaks and terminal cleanup, canonical owner-fact hashes with collision coverage, and allocation-free unconditional tick path; focused, 18000/100000 CLI, and quality gates pass.

verified: Re-review verified 4155e1499daa: phases 4/5 drive a bounded serializable JobCoreStore/ReservationLedger lifecycle with synchronized resident state, observational checkpoints permit legal active work, terminal checkpoints fail closed and the 100000-tick run proves non-zero job/reservation peaks plus terminal/acquire/release and zero terminal leaks; canonical world/read hashes now include all five need lanes and resident activity/reason, resource, location, job/reservation and other PR-1 owner/projection facts with equal-version collision tests; the unconditional fixed-tick path no longer calls allocation-bearing createMetrics or NeedStore.processScheduledUpdates APIs and retains owner-store authority. Focused 8 files/66 tests, 18000 and 100000 CLI, typecheck, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and full quality 75 files/425 tests all passed.

Fast-forwarded main through 961b8f0; exact-main handoff, task validation/status, diff check, typecheck, 8-file/66-test focused suite, 18000/100000 deterministic GameSession CLI gates, and full quality 75 files/425 tests passed.

saveLoadStance: No public save compatibility is introduced. Any internal GameSession snapshot in this task must be versioned, tested as focused PR-1 evidence and kept out of platform player-save promises.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-core depending on DOM, React, PixiJS, Electron, Node filesystem or real clocks
apps/**, packages/sim-worker/**, packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/persistence/** or Electron/Web implementation changes
tools/** except the exact tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts registry and tools/headless-runner/src/index.test.ts focused test paths
tools/headless-runner/src/cli.ts, package metadata, dynamic registration infrastructure, Node-global/process.argv access from sim-core, or any CLI-owned GameSession authority/logic copy
whole-world pawn work scans, unversioned caches, hidden global singleton session state, Promise/coroutine job position or UI-owned authority
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility actions

review.summary: Re-review verified 4155e1499daa: phases 4/5 drive a bounded serializable JobCoreStore/ReservationLedger lifecycle with synchronized resident state, observational checkpoints permit legal active work, terminal checkpoints fail closed and the 100000-tick run proves non-zero job/reservation peaks plus terminal/acquire/release and zero terminal leaks; canonical world/read hashes now include all five need lanes and resident activity/reason, resource, location, job/reservation and other PR-1 owner/projection facts with equal-version collision tests; the unconditional fixed-tick path no longer calls allocation-bearing createMetrics or NeedStore.processScheduledUpdates APIs and retains owner-store authority. Focused 8 files/66 tests, 18000 and 100000 CLI, typecheck, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and full quality 75 files/425 tests all passed.

integration.summary: Fast-forwarded main through 961b8f0; exact-main handoff, task validation/status, diff check, typecheck, 8-file/66-test focused suite, 18000/100000 deterministic GameSession CLI gates, and full quality 75 files/425 tests passed.
